commit.subject: LU-18330 tests: debug code for detach with unknown reason
commit.message:
LU-18330 tests: debug code for detach with unknown reason

Debug test code for layout lock revocation with unknow reason.
It causes the PCC file was detached form PCC cache.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-pcc env=ONLY=36b,ONLY_REPEAT=100
Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ie6a16b7c8fa9b225935bd932eafd01eeb8ece105
